events.title: Trivia Night
events.description: Nevada City’s longest running Trivia Night happens on *most* Wednesdays at the Crazy Horse. Great minds unite to Eat! Drink! Think! Bring your most clever friends, establish a team of up to five people and catalyze the collective power of your brilliant intellect. Your charismatic host BK will present questions covering a wide range of subjects in eight different categories. You’ll tap into knowledge you didn’t even realize you had. It’s challenging, it’s fun and it’s a refreshing change from th
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: The Geezer Gig
events.description: Over fifteen years running and still going strong, this “Second Friday Tradition” is as reliable as the tides. You definitely don’t have to be a geezer to appreciate this community pow wow. Bob Woods is the most eminently tasteful guitarist in the foothills. The lifelong railroad man is too good to be this humble, while firmly planted behind the wheel of the locomotive. Doubling as a member of ZZ Top, drummer Skip Alan Smith relishes his role in powering the steam engine of the groove. Retro-coo
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Love Mischief
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS If you were at the Chambers Project Gallery in Grass Valley back in December to behold the mindblowing display of art for the GD 60 Retrospective, you’ll remember the band providing the soundtrack to match the visual feast on hand. It was difficult to follow the previous night’s entertainment featuring the Grahame Lesh supergroup, White Lightning. Tabbed for that formidable slot was none other than Love Mischief. Continuing to roll with that momentum, the band makes its return t
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Late for the Train
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS Late for the Train is a modern string band rooted in the rich traditions of Americana, bluegrass, folk and Celtic music. Influenced by artists such as Kate Wolf, The Wood Brothers and Nickel Creek, the California-based group’s skillful craftsmanship meets tender harmonies and potent lyrics that grapple with wonder, contradiction and the truth of living in the modern age. They’ve wowed audiences at such festivals as Whale Rock, Kate Wolf Lost Sierra Hoedown and many more. The cor
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Band Beyond Description Presents...The Church of JGB
events.description: GET YOUR TICKETS **BBD has been moved up to an 8:30pm start for the time being!** If the Grateful Dead is your religion, then the Crazy Horse is your church when Third Thursday rolls around. Every month Jonny Mojo (Achilles Wheel), Gary Campus (Deadbeats) and Tim High (Tim High & the Mighty) host a cast of the finest musicians from around the region to conjure lightning in a bottle. events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States

events.title: Magoo **SOLD OUT**
events.description: On a Sunday at the end of July, a progressive bluegrass quartet from Denver, Colorado called Magoo was slated to play the Crazy Horse Saloon. In the lead up to the event, nary a single person in the area had heard of this band. How then can you explain that the show sold out and was instantly regarded as not only one of the highlights of the year, but one of the best shows many people had ever seen at this legendary venue? events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon & Grill, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, NV, 95959, United States
